assertions.assertion: Program.cs or an authentication setup file registers an OpenIdConnect handler with scheme name 'AAD' and SignInScheme set to IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme
The external login trigger calls Challenge with 'AAD' and stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items
assertions.rationale: ExternalLoginModel stores returnUrl in props.Items and calls Challenge(props, provider).

assertions.assertion: The callback handler calls HttpContext.AuthenticateAsync with IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme to read the external identity
The callback handler calls HttpContext.SignOutAsync with IdentityServerConstants.ExternalCookieAuthenticationScheme to clean up the temporary cookie
The callback handler creates an IdentityServerUser or ClaimsPrincipal with IdentityProvider set to the external scheme name
assertions.rationale: Creates new IdentityServerUser with IdentityProvider = scheme.
